title: cubespec — Monte Carlo, DOE, RSM and Sobol sensitivity for the 150 mm concrete cube compressive test
description: Python companion to the Sensitive-Spark thesis dashboard. Bit-for-bit reproducible Monte Carlo sampling, full and fractional factorial DOE, response surface fitting, Sobol sensitivity, bootstrap CIs, reliability analysis, and constrained optimisation against a calibrated Poly2-ridge surrogate of the 150 mm concrete cube compressive test. 16 worked Jupyter notebooks cover every dashboard control end-to-end.
